raw_cv_text:
Takahiro Hirano
+81-90-2847-5613 // takahiro.hirano@gmail.com // https://github.com/takahiro-hirano
EDUCATION
Tokyo Institute of Technology, B.S. Computer Science April 2022 - March 2026
Completed coursework in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Probability & Statistics with 3.8/4.0 GPA
Led study group of 8 students in Advanced Algorithms course, achieving 92% average exam performance
EXPERIENCE
Preferred Networks, Machine Learning Intern June 2024 - August 2024
Implemented and benchmarked 3 different convolutional neural network architectures on CIFAR-10 dataset, achieving 94.2%
accuracy with ResNet-18 variant
Optimized PyTorch model inference pipeline using quantization techniques, reducing inference latency by 38% on edge devices
Collaborated with 2 senior engineers to debug gradient flow issues in custom transformer layer, reducing training loss convergence
time from 8 hours to 4.5 hours
PROJECTS
Sentiment Analysis on Japanese Tweets, Python, BERT, PyTorch, Hugging Face, scikit-learn February 2024 - March 2024
Built fine-tuned BERT-based classifier for Japanese language sentiment detection with 87% F1-score on 5,000 labeled tweet
samples
Developed data preprocessing pipeline using tokenization and augmentation techniques that increased training dataset diversity by
40%
Hackathon: Image Classification for Medical X-Rays, TensorFlow, Keras, NumPy, Matplotlib November 2023
Engineered EfficientNet B0 model trained on 2,048 labeled chest X-ray images, achieving 89.5% AUC-ROC on holdout test set
Ranked 3rd place among 42 teams by implementing class balancing and cross-validation strategies that improved model
generalization
Time Series Forecasting: Stock Price Prediction, LSTM, TensorFlow, Pandas, Matplotlib, yfinance API December 2023 - January 2024
Constructed multi-layer LSTM neural network to forecast daily closing prices for 5 major stocks with MAPE of 3.2%
Engineered feature engineering pipeline extracting 12 technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands) improving model
accuracy by 15%
EXTRACURRICULAR
Tokyo Tech AI Club, Core Member April 2023 - Present
Organized and conducted 6 monthly workshops on ML fundamentals, attracting 50+ undergraduate participants per session
Mentored 4 junior students on implementing neural networks from scratch, with 100% project completion rate
Kaggle Competition Platform, Active Competitor September 2023 - Present
Competed in 8 machine learning competitions with top-15% finish in 3 competitions through ensemble methods and
hyperparameter optimization
Earned 892 Kaggle discussion upvotes by sharing reproducible code walkthroughs and feature engineering insights
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: Python, SQL, Japanese (Native), English (Fluent) Tools: Jupyter Notebook, Git, GitHub, Weights & Biases, Colab,
Technologies: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, scikit-learn, Docker, Linux
Hugging Face, BERT, CNNs, RNNs, LSTMs, XGBoost
